creator: rometravelers
caption:
@alexa.portoraro knows a spot and takes us to the Pantheon, Rome’s timeless marvel! 🏛️✨

💡The Pantheon is one of the best-preserved monuments of ancient Rome, originally built as a temple for all gods.

💡Famous for its massive dome and central oculus, letting natural light illuminate the interior.

💡Serves as a church today (Basilica of St. Mary and the Martyrs).

💡Home to tombs of important figures like Raphael and Italian kings.

💡Located in the heart of Rome, surrounded by charming piazzas and cafes—perfect for combining history with local vibes.

Would you step inside to admire the dome, or explore the surrounding piazza first? 🏛️☕

📍Pantheon 🇮🇹
